Journal.Title: Zhonghua liu xing bing xue za zhi = Zhonghua liuxingbingxue zazhi
Journal.ISOAbbreviation: Zhonghua Liu Xing Bing Xue Za Zhi

Article.ArticleTitle: [Genomic characteristics of toxigenic Vibrio cholerae O139 in Henan Province, 2001-2024].

Abstract.AbstractText: Objective: To explore the antimicrobial resistance phenotypes and whole genome characteristics of toxigenic Vibrio cholerae O139 strains in Henan Province, elucidate the evolving epidemiological trends of cholera outbreaks, and decipher molecular genetic variation patterns of the pathogen, thereby providing a reference for cholera prevention and control in the region. Methods: Drug susceptibility assay, whole genome sequencing assay, and bioinformatics analysis of 11 toxigenic Vibrio cholerae O139 strains isolated in Henan Province from 2001 to 2024. Results: All 11 strains were multi-drug resistant strains, resistant to all three antimicrobial drugs, polymyxin, nalidixic acid, and streptomycin, and all of them carried multi-drug resistant genes; all strains were ST69-type, and all of them carried the ctxA/B genes, sequence of CTXΦ phage, the VSP-Ⅰ gene island, VSP-Ⅱ gene island, the VPI-1 pathogenicity island, and the virulence genes ctxB, tcpA, and rstR carried by the strain are all of the El Tor type; the analysis of single-nucleotide polymorphisms (SNP) evolutionary tree revealed that 11 Vibrio cholerae strains were most closely related to Vibrio cholerae O139 strains in Taiwan. Conclusions: Using whole genome sequencing technology, it was revealed that all the outbreak strains of cholera in different regions of Henan Province carry multiple drug resistance and virulence genes, with highly similar genomic features and minor SNP differences between strains. It suggests that strengthened surveillance and early warning mechanisms targeting these strains are critically warranted.

MedlineJournalInfo.MedlineTA: Zhonghua Liu Xing Bing Xue Za Zhi

OtherAbstract.AbstractText: 目的： 探索河南省产毒型O139群霍乱弧菌的耐药表型、全基因组特征，揭示河南省霍乱疫情的发展趋势及病原菌分子遗传变异规律，为河南省霍乱疫情防控提供参考依据。 方法： 对河南省2001-2024年的11株产毒型O139群霍乱弧菌进行药物敏感性实验、全基因组测序实验及生物信息学分析。 结果： 11株菌均为多重耐药菌株，对多黏菌素、萘啶酸、链霉素3种抗菌药物全部耐药，且均携带多种耐药基因；所有菌株均为ST69型，均携带ctxA/B基因、CTXΦ噬菌体序列，VSP-Ⅰ、VSP-Ⅱ基因岛、VPI-1致病岛，且所携带的ctxB、tcpA、rstR毒力基因均为El Tor型；单核苷酸多态性（SNP）进化树分析，11株菌与中国台湾地区的O139群霍乱弧菌亲缘关系最近。 结论： 利用全基因组测序技术揭示了河南省霍乱暴发菌株基因组特征高度相似，菌株间SNP差异较小，发生聚集性疫情风险较大，需加强对该类霍乱弧菌的监测预警。.
